content:
### FallbackChunker (corvia-kernel)

## Config

```toml
[chunking]
max_tokens = 512           # target max per chunk
min_tokens = 32            # chunks below this get merged with neighbors
overlap_tokens = 64        # ~12% overlap at 512 max
strategy = "auto"          # "auto" = format registry, or force a specific strategy
```


## Observability (D23/D45/D62 conventions)
